# flashblade_directory_service_management (Data Source)

Reads the current FlashBlade management directory service (LDAP admin) configuration. Singleton — no arguments needed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read the current management directory service configuration.
# Singleton — no arguments.
data "flashblade_directory_service_management" "current" {}

output "ldap_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_directory_service_management.current.enabled
}

output "ldap_uris" {
  value = data.flashblade_directory_service_management.current.uris
}

output "ca_cert_group_name" {
  value = data.flashblade_directory_service_management.current.ca_certificate_group.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `base_dn` (String) Base Distinguished Name used when searching the directory.
- `bind_user` (String) DN of the user used to bind to the directory.
- `ca_certificate` (Attributes) Reference to a named object. Null when the reference is not set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ca_certificate))
- `ca_certificate_group` (Attributes) Reference to a named object. Null when the reference is not set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ca_certificate_group))
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the management directory service is enabled.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the management directory service.
- `services` (List of String) Services using this directory service configuration.
- `ssh_public_key_attribute` (String) LDAP attribute holding the user's SSH public key.
- `uris` (List of String) List of LDAP server URIs (e.g. ldaps://ldap.example.com:636).
- `user_login_attribute` (String) LDAP attribute holding the user's login name (e.g. sAMAccountName or uid).
- `user_object_class` (String) LDAP object class for management users (e.g. User, posixAccount).

<a id="nestedatt--ca_certificate"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ca_certificate`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Name of the referenced object. Null when the reference is not set.


<a id="nestedatt--ca_certificate_group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ca_certificate_group`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Name of the referenced object. Null when the reference is not set.
